member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.CallbackManager
member.summary: CallbackManager main class.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.CallbackManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.Datalogs
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to DatalogService.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.Datalogs.PrimeSetTestNameOverride(System.String)
member.summary: Set alternative instance name for the upcoming tname datalogs. This alternative instance name will be reset at every end instance..
member.param: The new alternate Instance Name to replace.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.DieIdBinning
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to the DieIdBinningService.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.DieIdBinning.PrimeSavePortInformationForCurrentDieId(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the given port number, associated with current dieIds and flow item name.
member.param: The port number to save for die id binning purposes.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.DieIdBinning.PrimeSetAdditionalCurrentDieIds(System.String)
member.summary: Set additional current Die Ids to be used when saving port information for current flow item. In IP context. It is designed to be use with DFF Service SetCurrentDieId, which only allows one current dieId at a time.
member.param: Die Ids. Comma separated string.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents
member.summary: Defines Primes predefined FlowEvent capable callbacks. These callbacks are intended to be used with the FlowEvent infrastructure. All of the callbacks declared here always have the input argument signature of receiving the port number first and then the rest of the input arguments. Ex: {port,arg0,arg1,...}.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents.PrimeSetCurrentTimeSnapShot(System.String)
member.summary: Saves a timestamp when the callback gets executed to the given key in sharedStorage. This is intended to be used with FlowEvents. If its not used as flow event provide the key name as second param. When this callback is used as FlowEvent the first parameter will always be the current port number of the given test flow, this is not used and is automatically populated by TOS, hence only key argument is required. Example non flow event: args = "param1,keyName".
member.param: Comma separated string of arguments.
member.exception: Throws if args does not contain two arguments.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents.StoreCurrentMemoryParameters(System.String)
member.summary: Saves private and virtual memory into 2 sharedStorage keys. First key will store private memory and second key will store virtual memory. This is intended to be used with FlowEvents. If its not used as flow event provide the key name as second param. When this callback is used as FlowEvent the first parameter will always be the current port number of the given test flow, this is not used and is automatically populated by TOS, hence only key argument is required. Example non flow event: args = "param1,keyName1,keyName2".
member.param: Comma separated string of arguments.
member.exception: Throws if args does not contain two arguments.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents.DisableDeflates(System.String)
member.summary: Disables deflates.
member.param: Args.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents.EnableDeflates(System.String)
member.summary: Enable deflates.
member.param: Args.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FlowEvents.PrimeSetDeviceStartTimeSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Callback intended to be used ONLY as a flow event for the beginning of the TestPlanStart flow. The functionality of this method is to store a snapshot of the current device start time. No argument needs to be passed to this callback when use as a flow event.
member.param: Comma separated string of arguments.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.FuseRead
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to FuseReadService.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FuseRead.PrimeSetSimulationString(System.String)
member.summary: Set simulation string through usercode or preinstance with callback. The simulation string will post-process and store to dut level sharedstorage with default reset policy. It will be use at Execute with condition of it is simulation mode and matched sharedstorage key that include configurationName and registerName.
member.param: Register name and simulation string value to override. Format example: CPU0@000111 (single register) or CPU0@000111,CPU1@1111000 (multiple register).

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.FuseRead.PrimePostProcessUltDecode(System.String)
member.summary: Compare decoded Lot/Wafer/X/Y values to EI station controller globals. Expectation is that PrimeFuseReadMaskUltDecode Test Method executes prior to this UF execution. Example of usage: PrimePostProcessUltDecode!U1,true,true".
member.param: Comma seperated string with the format of "DieIdNames","isCompareLot","isIgnoreLastChar".

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.IProcessWrapper
member.summary: IRamWrapper.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.IProcessWrapper.GetMemorySize64
member.summary: Get current process memory size.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.IProcessWrapper.GetPrivateMemorySize64
member.summary: Get current process private memory size.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.IProcessWrapper.GetVirtualMemorySize64
member.summary: Get current process virtual memory size.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to PrimeMemorySnapshot.

member.name: F:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot.processWrapper
member.summary: ProcessWrapper used to get the private memory.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot.PrimeMemorySnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: PrimeMemorySnapshot print the memory used at that given time of the execution.
member.param: Custom postfix set by users and added in tname wrote in ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot.SetProcessWrapper(Prime.Callbacks.IProcessWrapper)
member.summary: Set process object.
member.param: processWrapper.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.MemorySnapshot.GetMemoryPrintout(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get memory printout using mrslt ituff format.
member.param: Postfix.
Memory size.
member.returns: Memory printout in mrslt ituff format.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.PatternModify
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to SmartTc.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PatternModify.PrimeEnablePatternModifyCache(System.String)
member.summary: Pause monitoring callback of the pins associated to the configName given as input. Checks for existence in activeConfigs.
member.param: Not used.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PatternModify.PrimeDisablePatternModifyCache(System.String)
member.summary: Resume monitor callback of the pins associated to the configName given as input.
member.param: Configuration Name.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PatternModify.PrimeProcessPatConfigServicePendingApplies(System.String)
member.summary: Processes all pending PatConfigService applies.
member.param: Whatever. It will be ignored.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.PatternReader
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to PatternReader.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PatternReader.PrintPlistContent(System.String)
member.summary: Read the patterns from the given plists..
member.param: The plist names.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PatternReader.PrimeReadPatternPinData(System.String)
member.summary: Read pin data for specific pattern. Arguments examples: - (MyTokenName2|generic|xxHPCC_DPIN_Dig_slcB_A0|l=Start|6). - (MyTokenName3|generic|HPCC_DPIN_Dig_slcB_by2B_grp|a=1|36).
member.param: Arguments needed to readout pin data (token|pattern|pin|a/l=address or label|numberOfVectors).

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.PinMonitor
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to PinMonitor.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PinMonitor.PrimePinMonitorPause(System.String)
member.summary: Pause monitoring callback of the pins associated to the configName given as input. Checks for configName existence in activeConfigs.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a pin configuration in the json file.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.PinMonitor.PrimePinMonitorResume(System.String)
member.summary: Resume monitor callback of the pins associated to the configName given as input. Checks for configName existence in pausedConfigs.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a pin configuration in the json file.
member.exception: Thrown when the PinMonitorService fails to resume the monitor for the provided configName.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.ProcessWrapper
member.summary: RamWrapper.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to the SharedStorageService.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetStringFromDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on DUT scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetIntegerFromDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on DUT scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetDoubleFromDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on DUT scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertStringToDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an string on DUT scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertIntegerToDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an integer on DUT scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertDoubleToDutTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an double on DUT scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetStringFromIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on IP scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetIntegerFromIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on IP scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeGetDoubleFromIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given key as an integer value on IP scope..
member.param: The key from the shared storage.
member.returns: The value from the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertStringToIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an string on IP scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertIntegerToIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an integer on IP scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SharedStorage.PrimeInsertDoubleToIpTable(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts the given key=value as an double on IP scope.
member.param: The value to set in the shared storage. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.SmartTc
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to SmartTc.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SmartTc.PrimeEnableSmartTc(System.String)
member.summary: Enables the SmartTc.
member.param: This argument is to be ignored as the enable smart Tc doesn't need parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.SmartTc.PrimeDisableSmartTc(System.String)
member.summary: Disables the SmartTc.
member.param: This argument is to be ignored as the disable smart Tc doesn't need parameters.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.TestProgram
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to the TestProgram.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.TestProgram.PrimeExecuteTestInstance(System.String)
member.summary: Executes a Prime Test Instance.
member.param: The argument will be the name of the test instance to execute.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.TestProgram.PrimeIsForceReverifyNeeded(System.String)
member.summary: Determine whether a force reverify is needed.
member.param: This argument is to be ignored as this method doesn't need parameters.
member.returns: Returns true if force reverify is needed, else return false.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.TestProgram.PrimeEnableTestProgramDebug(System.String)
member.summary: Enables the test program debug mode.
member.param: NA.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.TestProgram.PrimeDisableTestProgramDebug(System.String)
member.summary: Disables the test program debug mode.
member.param: NA.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.ThreadAlignment
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to SmartTc.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.ThreadAlignment.PrimeAcquireOnlyMeLock(System.String)
member.summary: Enables the SmartTc.
member.param: This argument is to be ignored as the enable smart Tc doesn't need parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.ThreadAlignment.PrimeReleaseOnlyMeLock(System.String)
member.summary: Disables the SmartTc.
member.param: This argument is to be ignored as the disable smart Tc doesn't need parameters.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable
member.summary: Defines the callbacks related to the UserVariableService.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeGetStringUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given user variable name as an string.
member.param: The name of the user variable.
member.returns: The value of the given user variable.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeGetIntegerUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given user variable name as an integer.
member.param: The name of the user variable.
member.returns: The value of the given user variable.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeGetDoubleUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the given user variable name as an double.
member.param: The name of the user variable.
member.returns: The value of the given user variable.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeSetStringUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the given user variable name=value as an string.
member.param: The user variable and value. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeSetIntegerUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the given user variable name=value as an integer.
member.param: The user variable and value. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.UserVariable.PrimeSetDoubleUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the given user variable name=value as an double.
member.param: The user variable and value. Must be of the format=`Key=value`.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.ICallbackManager
member.summary: Scoreboard Service interface.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.ICallbackManager.Register(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers all Prime's callbacks.
member.param: Current's instance session context.

member.name: M:Prime.Callbacks.ICallbackManager.Unregister(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregisters all Prime's callbacks. It should be called during Unload.
member.param: Current's instance session context.

member.name: T:Prime.Callbacks.Manager
member.summary: Static class with the getter of the ICallbackManager implementation.

member.name: P:Prime.Callbacks.Manager.Get
member.summary: Gets or sets the ICallbackManager implementation.
